title: labyby
description: The resource pack adds 8 types of charming Labuboos that work as totems of immortality, sit on their heads and delight with their cuteness, and they can be found in abandoned structures with different chances of falling out.
body:
✨ Brief description of the "Labubu in Minecraft" resource pack

This fun and colorful resource pack adds to the game ** 8 unique species of Labubu** — cute creatures that not only delight the eye, but also ** save from death**!  

📌 Main Features:  
- 8 types of Labubu 🎨:
black - 
green  - 
pink -  
rainbow - 
cry - 
crime - 
ghost - 
among - 
 
- Rare drop – they can be found in abandoned structure, each type has its own chance of dropping.  
- Alternative to the totem** – each Labubu  protects from death **, like the totem of immortality, but it looks much prettier!  
- Decorative feature – You can put them on your head and show off your collection to your friends.  

💡 Future updates:  
The author promises to add new types of Lububu based on the most popular comments! So **like and subscribe** to influence the content.  

🎯 Who is this pack for?
- For lovers of **cute and unusual** textures.  
- For those who want to **customize their gameplay** with fun mechanics.  
- For collectors who love **rare and unique items**.  

Collect all the Labuboos, wear them on your head and have fun playing! 🎀💖

*(P.S. Amongus Labubu is not a traitor... Or is it?)* 😏
